author: 2ZD1
content:
## Orchestration role: server crate (consumer)

**Prerequisite**: Issue #5 (protocol) must be merged into main first. This issue is blocked by #5 in the dependency graph.

**Hard constraints — DO NOT:**
- Create or modify root Cargo.toml (workspace already exists)
- Create or modify crates/crossbridge-protocol/ (already implemented; just import it)
- Modify any other crate (crates/crossbridge/, crates/crossbridge-supervisor/, crates/crossbridge-client/)
- Re-implement protocol message types — import them from `crossbridge_protocol`

**Scope for this issue:**
- Add ONLY crates/crossbridge-server/ to the existing workspace
- Add the new crate to workspace.members in root Cargo.toml (one-line edit only)
- Implement per .design/server.md
- Use `crossbridge-protocol = { workspace = true }` and `crosslink = { workspace = true }`

**Definition of done:**
- cargo build -p crossbridge-server passes
- cargo test -p crossbridge-server passes
- Work committed; ready to merge
